heading: Docketing appeal and record—(Rule)
label: 3738 Docketing appeal and record—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedureFiling record on appeal and docketing proceeding; time, Rule 39(c).

References in TextRule 39 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure was abrogated , eff. , and is covered by Rules 10 to 12, Federal Rules of Appellate Procedure, set out in the Appendix to Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Dec. 4, 1967July 1, 1968
